name: forge-character
description: Guided tabletop RPG character builder with rules-aware validation, exports, and optional local AI assist.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @forge/rules-core && npm run build --workspace @forge/ui && npm run build --workspace @forge/api && npm run build --workspace @forge/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @forge/rules-core && npm run typecheck --workspace @forge/ui && npm run typecheck --workspace @forge/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @forge/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @forge/rules-core && npm run test --workspace @forge/api && npm run test --workspace @forge/web && node --test src/legacy-ai.test.js
